content.en:
The second space-time supreme technique created by Ye Tian is Void Walking!

This is a speed-based space-time supreme skill, and it has the effect of canceling attacks, and it is in the void walking, and the enemy's attack falls on you, and more than ninety percent will be canceled out.

After all, he currently has an offensive space-time supreme technique, the Void Touch, so there is no need to create another attack-type space-time supreme skill, and creating a space-time supreme skill like Void Walking will help improve his strength.

With the creation of the space-time supreme technique of Void Walking, Ye Tian's strength has greatly improved.

Next, Ye Tian didn't create a space-time supreme technique, and it was difficult for him to create another space-time supreme technique in a short period of time.

Therefore, he devoted himself to improving his space-time control power and elevating his space-time supreme body.

His supreme legendary body is already a masterpiece, and it is difficult to continue to improve, but the supreme body of time and space, which is condensed by the power of space-time control, can continue to improve, and his physical strength will become stronger and stronger.

Improving space-time fusion is equivalent to improving cultivation, not only the power of space-time control will increase, but the space-time supreme body will also increase, and the strength can naturally be enhanced.

Moreover, he can enjoy an immeasurable fruit every other eternal era, and over the years, he can also improve a lot of willpower.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also occasionally went to comprehend other Dao, trying to control more Dao, which was also beneficial to his own accumulation of heritage.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's legendary-level ancestors became more and more, and the Dao he controlled naturally became more and more.

In a flash, hundreds of eternal epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was contemplating and cultivating, and the Lord of the Dark Word came to inform Ye Tian of a major news.

"Endless Lord, I'm chatting with other Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and I need to know that the Domain City is about to open!"

The Lord of the Word said.

The City of the Realm!

Ye Tian naturally knew this place, this city was located in an untouchable and mysterious place, it was said that it was established by several eternal masters, and it was given a chance that any peak Legendary Realm Lord could enter it.

However, it will only be opened once in a long time, and usually no one can enter the Dao Domain City, or even find it or perceive it.

"Is the message accurate~?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Dark Word affirmed, "Exactly, the news that came from the mouth of one of the peak Legendary Realm Lords of the Time Merchant was revealed by the Eternal Controller behind the Time Firm.

The news revealed by the Eternal Ruler must be true.

Thinking of Dao Domain City, Ye Tian was also quite excited in his heart.

It is rumored that the Dao Domain City is an opportunity left by the Eternal Masters to the Peak Legend Lord, and there is no restriction on any Peak Legend Realm Lord.

It does not belong to any one power, nor to any one of the Eternal Masters.

The city of the Dao Domain is divided into three major domains, the first domain, the second domain, and the third domain, of which the third domain contains the greatest opportunity, but if you want to reach the third domain, you need to rely on comprehensive factors such as strength and comprehension talent.

Most of the peak Legendary Realm lords can only stay in the first realm, but if they can enter it, if they are lucky, they can break the shackles and improve their strength.

For example, some peak Legendary Realm lords entered the Dao Domain City, and after they came out, they broke through from the first level to the second level.

Of course, there are also legendary realm lords themselves who are in shackles, so they have not broken the shackles, and their strength has not improved much, but they still have some gains, at least it will be easier to break the shackles in the future.

At this time.

The news of the imminent opening of Dao Domain City spread throughout the Void Region, and many peak Legendary Realm Lords were excited.

The immeasurable sea, the eternal holy land.

Lord Wuheng also learned the news of Dao Domain City, and he was also quite excited.

"If I break through to the second level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord with the help of Dao Domain City this time, even if I can't defeat Endless Lord Ye Tian, he can't kill me with one blow. Moreover, the treasure I once obtained can only be controlled by the power of space-time control, and if I break through to the second level, with the power of space-time control, my strength will skyrocket significantly, and I don't necessarily need to be afraid of the Endless Lord. "

Lord Wuheng said secretly.

He was looking forward to the opening of the Dao Domain City.

And there are naturally a lot of peak Legendary Realm Lords who are extremely looking forward to being like Lord Wuheng, and they are all preparing.

Before you know it, hundreds of eternal years have passed.

this day.

Somewhere in the Void Zone, an illusory giant city emerges.

Soon, one by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords came here.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Underword also came, and the Lord of the Ice River also came.

The lord of the sword, the lord of the impermanence, the lord of the border.

However, the white-bearded old man did not come, but the Lord of the Shaking Mountain came.

Not long ago, the Lord of the Shaking Mountain had also broken through to the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord, so he was eligible to enter the Dao Domain City.

"Endless Lord!"

"Lord of the Mountain!"

Ye Tian said hello to the Lord of the Shaking Mountain

They were all entering the Dao City for the first time, but the Ice Lord was the second time.

"Lord of the Shaking Mountain, won't the white-bearded old man enter the Dao Domain City?" Ye Hao asked curiously.

Lord Shaking Mountain explained: "Endless Lord, my master has no interest in Dao City, Dao City is not of much help to my master, with my master's identity and status, I can even contact the Eternal Controller directly, there is no need to participate. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he immediately became more curious about the strength of the white-bearded old man.

Even in a place like Dao Domain City, the white-bearded old man was not even interested.

"Maybe Bai (Zhao De's) old man beard has reached the fifth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If you reach this level, you can hardly make any progress, and you can only impact the Eternal Master, but once you fail, it will be the end of your fall, so the white-bearded old man doesn't want to impact the Eternal Master now.

Suddenly.

Dao Domain City generated a special wave that connected the area where Ye Tian and other peak Legendary Realm lords were located

"It's time to go in!"

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords flew into the Dao Domain City.

Layers of time and space were crossed, and soon they came to a new world, but it didn't seem to be really entering the city.

From Ye Tian's point of view, the city was still in an untouchable state.

But all the Peak Legendary Realm Lords knew very well that they had come to the First Dao Domain of Dao Domain City.
